rationale: The score is identical (4/10) across both evaluations, and the justifications and concerns are reworded restatements of the same core point: the candidate lacks direct experience in SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator performance analysis, and hardware-software co-design. The only employer names changed (re:cinq/Optilyz/GISCollective to Naver/Tencent/MercadoLibre), and none of the variant's reasoning keys off those names — there is no penalty, age, or nationality inference. The minor differences in phrasing and the swap of generic strength bullets are within ordinary run-to-run noise.
